failure_modes.cause: Temperature drop below 80°C causes TBAB/EG eutectic to solidify, blocking flow
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant heating zones with temperature monitoring every 2m of tubing

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity DES (>50 cP at 120°C) causes excessive wear on pump seals at ultra-low flow rates
failure_modes.mitigation: Use magnetically coupled pump with ceramic seals rated for high-viscosity fluids

failure_modes.cause: Laminar flow (Re=2) prevents adequate mixing of quench reagent, leading to product degradation
failure_modes.mitigation: Install static mixer at quench injection point or increase quench flow rate 10x

single_points_of_failure: DES feed pump — failure stops reaction completely
Main heating zone — loss causes immediate crystallization
validation_experiments: Cool DES solution from 120°C to 60°C in 1mm tubing; measure pressure rise and flow stoppage point
Run DES at 0.098 mL/min through pump for 24h; monitor seal integrity and pressure stability
Inject quench at T-junction with Re=2 flow; analyze product purity vs mixing time
